description: Pace v10 planner response shape. Grammar enforces top-level shape + intent enum + payload-is-object. Inner payload schemas validated at runtime against intent-specific shape (see system prompt). Decoupled because nested union constraints are harder on streaming decoders.

spokenText.description: What TTS reads aloud. Short confirmation for actions; the answer text for answer intents; '(dictating)' or similar for dictate.

payload.description: Intent-specific payload. Shapes documented in v10 system prompt and validated at runtime.

name.description: For intent=action: action name from registry

args.description: For intent=action: action args matching registry schema

calls.description: For intent=action with multiple parallel calls

argument.description: For intent=edit: optional argument (e.g. replacement text)
